title: EarthSciIO cache manifest (meta/<key>.json)
description: Per-blob validation/provenance record stored alongside every cached blob at cache/v1/meta/<sha256(resolved_url)>.json. Identical across Python/Julia/Rust so a blob fetched by one language is reused (and re-validated) by the others.

schema.description: Manifest schema tag. Bump with the cache-format version.

url.description: The resolved source URL (after time-anchor + parameter expansion) whose sha256 is this blob's cache key. The key is sha256(url) encoded UTF-8, no trailing newline.

etag.description: HTTP ETag from the response, if any. Used for conditional GET (If-None-Match) revalidation.

last_modified.description: HTTP Last-Modified from the response, if any. Used for conditional GET (If-Modified-Since).

sha256_content.description: sha256 of the downloaded blob bytes (self-pinned integrity hash; loaders declare no checksum today).

bytes.description: Blob size in bytes (must equal the on-disk blob length).

fetched_at.description: RFC 3339 / ISO 8601 UTC timestamp the blob was fetched. Fixtures pin a constant value for reproducibility.

source_loader.description: Name of the .esm loader that resolved this URL (debug/provenance; not part of the key).

auth_realm.description: Auth realm used to fetch (e.g. cds, openaq, rda), or null for unauthenticated. Credentials are never stored.
